title: Lorell Raiders
content:

{{Quote|When the Jedi finally wiped out the Lorell Raiders, the pirate fleets never returned. The worlds of the Hapes were forgotten for a time, and the women of Hapes took control of their destiny and vowed no man would ever rule them again.|Isolder|<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref>}}
The '''Lorell Raiders''' were a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group in the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]], a closely packed [[Star cluster/Legends|star cluster]] located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], some time before [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]].

[[Gender/Legends|Male]]-dominated, they would plunder countless [[Planet/Legends|planets]] beyond the hazardous [[Transitory Mists]], seizing ships and stealing cargo, and would abduct beautiful [[Human/Legends|human]] women as prizes to the hidden worlds of the Hapes Cluster and raised their children, and targeted the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

After all the male pirates were [[Battle of Lorell|wiped out]] by the Galactic Republic and [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], their descendants, mostly women and children, vowed that no man will never rule them again and formed a matriarchal society called the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] and due to isolated gene pool, they evolved into species of [[Near-Human|near-human]] known as the [[Hapan]]s.

==History==
===Era of the raiders===
{{Quote|The Hapes Cluster was originally settled by pirates, a group called the Lorell Raiders. For hundreds of years they stalked the trade routes of the Old Republic, seizing ships, stealing cargo. And when they found a beautiful woman, some raider would take her as a prize to the hidden worlds of Hapes.|Princess Leia|<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia" />}}
They learned of safe routes through the hazardous [[Transitory Mists]] that surrounded the cluster, the first to find the only suspected hyperspace entry route into the Hapes Cluster, and took refuge there along with a number of abductees, along with any other treasure they would plunder, such as ships and cargo. The Lorell Raiders expanded into a powerful, albeit loose, confederacy of pirates and also would abduct beautiful [[Human/Legends|human]] women and bring them back to [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]] where the women would stay on Hapes and raise their children, only returning to Hapes to rest after each raid. Life for the captured denizens was one of misery, where the captured women were casually sold among the pirates as slaves.

===Downfall===
{{Main|Battle of Lorell}}
The Lorell Raiders had eventually began to target the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], having grown too bold and amassing the majority of their forces for an extended campaign of plundering unimpeded, with only the women, children, and a handful of enforcers were left behind, this practice went on for many years, however they were mostly [[Battle of Lorell|wiped out]] over [[Lorell]] after refusing to surrender around [[4030 BBY]] by an awaiting Republic taskforce led by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] under [[Arca Jeth]]. Cut off from retreat, the Lorell Raiders fought to the end and were destroyed.

===Legacy===
{{Main|Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapan}}
{{Quote|Never let a man become so deluded as to believe that he is the intellectual equal of a woman. It only leads him to evil.|Hapan saying|<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia" />}}
Following this, the women who had been forced into servitude began a short, bloody, revolt that saw the removal of the last remaining Lorell Raiders and instituted a new matriarchal society, the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]], where no man would ever govern, ruled instead by an all-powerful [[Queen Mother]]. Due to an isolated gene pool, became the near-Human [[Hapan]]s, who went on to develop a strong hatred of the Jedi for the death they brought to the raiders.
